_comment: WS-A shared hero bases (VFX_ASSETS §2-3). One CC0 KayKit Adventurers base per cohort, trimmed to the six clips the animator drives. Unlike heroes.json these are NOT recolored at build time: the renderer clones the base per hero and tints it to that hero's three-color palette at runtime (engine recolorToPalette), so one ~1.4MB file serves a whole cohort instead of one file per hero. Raw bases live in tmp/asset_src/kaykit (gitignored); only the optimized output under public/assets/bases is committed.

items.source: KayKit Adventurers (Kay Lousberg) Mage base, runtime-recolored per hero — CC0
